purpose: Prerequisite videos for Grade 4 NCERT Chapter 13: The Transport Museum
description: Videos covering: Indian money basics, multi-digit addition, and telling time in hours and minutes

videos.title: Indian Money - Rupees and Paise
videos.description: Learn about Indian money! Understand rupees and paise, identify different coins and notes, and practice counting money. This will help you solve ticket price problems at the transport museum.
learningObjectives: Count money using rupees and paise
Understand the relationship between rupees and paise

videos.title: Adding 3 and 4 Digit Numbers
videos.description: Review how to add 3-digit and 4-digit numbers with carrying. This skill is needed for adding distances, calculating total costs, and solving transport problems in Chapter 13.

videos.title: Telling Time - Hours and Minutes
videos.description: Learn to tell time using hours and minutes on a clock. Understand the hour hand and minute hand, and practise reading time. This is essential for solving travel time problems at the museum.
learningObjectives: Read time on a clock face
Tell time to the nearest 5 minutes

usageNotes.purpose: Review money counting, multi-digit addition, and time-telling before learning distance, time, and money calculations in Chapter 13
usageNotes.recommendationStrategy: Select based on weak concepts identified in readiness assessment
usageNotes.sequencing: Indian money basics → Adding 3 and 4 digit numbers → Telling time in hours and minutes
